name: feature.campaign-orchestration.agents
description: Campaign Studio agent pack (ADR 0158 / ADR 0014) — the Campaign Strategist, the chat-driven orchestrator (ADR 0058). It runs a campaign conversationally: validate the brief, generate + approve the messaging kernel, generate each enabled channel, check cross-asset consistency, and finalize the marketing campaign — tool-allowlisted across the campaign-brief, campaign-channels, and campaign-studio node packs.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Campaign Strategist
agents.description: The chat-driven Campaign Studio orchestrator — validates the brief, generates + approves the messaging kernel, generates each enabled channel, checks cross-asset consistency, and finalizes the marketing campaign. The human approves the kernel and each channel.
